check: floor-vs-rate exposure (frozen window at GCP rate band)
detail: [MEASURED arithmetic from frozen constants] The pinned analysis window binds the admissible EFFECTIVE rate to [0.081,0.595]/h AND the ledger to instance_hours in [260.6,900]h + usd_total in [73,155]. At a rate BELOW $0.28 the $73 usd_total FLOOR becomes the binding lower constraint (usd_total>=73 needs instance_hours>=73/rate > 260.6). Admissible BLENDED s/prefill band for the 19964-prefill mandatory campaign: $0.19->[69.3,147.1]s, $0.20->[65.8,139.8]s, $0.24->[54.8,116.5]s, $0.28->[47.0,99.8]s. The ASM-2205 pessimistic corner blended = 462.1h*3600/19964 = 83.31 s/prefill, which is INSIDE the admissible band at EVERY quoted rate -> at corner throughput the ledger validates ($0.20->$92.42, $0.24->$110.9). EXPOSURE: the run STOPS fail-closed at the addendum-(7) affordability gate ONLY if the REAL box measures blended s/prefill BELOW the band floor (65.8-69.3 s at $0.19-0.20/h), i.e. >~1.2-1.27x FASTER than the frozen corner. Reference: prior repo GLM-5.2 throughput (poc/modal stage3 plan) projected 16-35 s/prefill on SHORT teacher-forced items (NOT directly comparable to f1k's full-QA + d3-text-prepend scoring prefills). Cutting the OTHER way: n2d = AMD EPYC (no AVX-512) vs the Intel i4i.2xlarge the corner was calibrated on -> plausibly SLOWER, clearing the floor. RESOLUTION: MEASURED at bring-up (project_ledger() gate, fail-closed both floor and ceiling); NOT a runner conclusion. This FLOOR interaction is additive to the coordinator's pzb6-resolution (which addressed the rate-in-window/ceiling side); surfaced for coordinator awareness — a bring-up affordability STOP is a possible (bounded) outcome, and would be a cost-model-vs-rate re-derive decision (Fable/coordinator/maintainer), NOT a retry.
